title: Student Conduct: Personal Telecommunications/Electronic Devices
description: Conroe ISD's rules for student use of personal cell phones, smartwatches, earbuds, and other electronic devices at school and school-related activities are outlined here. The policy explains when and how students may use these devices, as well as the consequences for misuse or violations. Parents, students, and staff can refer to this policy to understand expectations around personal technology during the school day.
